subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This is Thy handmaid, assured in Thy signs and enkindled with the fire of Thy love, whose brother hath ascended unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه امتک الموقنه بایاتک المشتعله بنار محبتک قد صعد شقیقها الی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
